title: Section 21
content: (1) Every limited liability partnership shall ensure that its invoices, official correspondence and publications bear the following, namely:-- (a) the name, address of its registered office and registration number of the limited liability partnership; and (b) a statement that it is registered with limited liability. 1[(2) If the limited liability partnership contravenes the provisions of this section, the limited liability partnership shall be liable to a penalty of ten thousand rupees.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 31 of 2021, s. 10, for sub-section (2) (w.e.f. 1-4-2022).
